_source: Kroeze, Kristensen, Pucher — 171Yb Reference Data (Feb 2026), arXiv:2509.04416v2
_notes: Energies in cm^-1 from NIST / derived from transition tables. gF values in MHz/G. A_hfs in MHz. Zeeman coefficients μB·gF/h in kHz/G. Frequencies are 171Yb values; for 174Yb the interface applies isotope shifts from transitions.json.

states.label: ⁶s² ¹S₀
states.notes: Ground state. μBgF arises from nuclear spin only (gI·μN). No fine structure.

states.label: ⁶s⁶p ³P₀
states.notes: Metastable clock state. Finite E1 decay in 171Yb via hyperfine mixing gives ~21s lifetime; in bosonic 174Yb the transition is forbidden without external B mixing. gF is the clock-state Zeeman from higher-order fine-structure mixing.

states.label: ⁶s⁶p ³P₁
states.notes: Intercombination line. Green MOT upper state. 1.7% singlet admixture via spin-orbit coupling (β ≈ -0.12905).

states.label: ⁶s⁶p ³P₂
states.notes: Metastable. Green clock transition upper state. Decays via M2 to 1S0, M1 to 3P1, and hyperfine-induced E1 channels in 171Yb.

states.label: ⁶s⁶p ¹P₁
states.notes: Broad dipole-allowed transition to ground. Blue MOT / Zeeman slower upper state. Branching back to ground is ~1 − 6×10⁻⁸ → effectively cycling.

states.label: ⁵d⁶s ³D₁
states.notes: IR repumper target from 3P0. Branches to 3P0 (64%), 3P1 (35%), 3P2 (1%).

states.label: ⁵d⁶s ³D₂
states.notes: Sibling of 3D1 in the 5d6s manifold. Not a primary cooling/repumping target in this dataset.

states.label: ⁶s⁷s ³S₁
states.notes: Red repumper target from 3P0 (649 nm) and 3P2 (770 nm). Branches to 3P2 (51%), 3P1 (36%), 3P0 (13%), and 1P1 (0.21%).
